attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_QP_PRICING_ATTRIBUTES.PRICING_ATTRIBUTE_ID, STG_CG1_QP_PRICING_ATTRIBUTES.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_QP_PRICING_ATTRIBUTES.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_QP_PRICING_ATTRIBUTES.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_QP_PRICING_ATTRIBUTES.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_QP_PRICING_ATTRIBUTES.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CG1_QP_PRICING_ATTRIBUTES.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID, STG_CG1_QP_PRICING_ATTRIBUTES.PROGRAM_ID, STG_CG1_QP_PRICING_ATTRIBUTES.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_QP_PRICING_ATTRIBUTES.REQUEST_ID, STG_CG1_QP_PRICING_ATTRIBUTES.LIST_LINE_ID, STG_CG1_QP_PRICING_ATTRIBUTES.EXCLUDER_FLAG, STG_CG1_QP_PRICING_ATTRIBUTES.ACCUMULATE_FLAG, STG_CG1_QP_PRICING_ATTRIBUTES.PRODUCT_ATTRIBUTE_CONTEXT, STG_CG1_QP_PRICING_ATTRIBUTES.PRODUCT_ATTRIBUTE, STG_CG1_QP_PRICING_ATTRIBUTES.PRODUCT_ATTR_VALUE, STG_CG1_QP_PRICING_ATTRIBUTES.PRODUCT_UOM_CODE, STG_CG1_QP_PRICING_ATTRIBUTES.PRICING_ATTRIBUTE_CONTEXT, STG_CG1_QP_PRICING_ATTRIBUTES.PRICING_ATTRIBUTE, STG_CG1_QP_PRICING_ATTRIBUTES.PRICING_ATTR_VALUE_FROM, STG_CG1_QP_PRICING_ATTRIBUTES.PRICING_ATTR_VALUE_TO, STG_CG1_QP_PRICING_ATTRIBUTES.ATTRIBUTE_GROUPING_NO, STG_CG1_QP_PRICING_ATTRIBUTES.PRODUCT_ATTRIBUTE_DATATYPE, STG_CG1_QP_PRICING_ATTRIBUTES.PRICING_ATTRIBUTE_DATATYPE, STG_CG1_QP_PRICING_ATTRIBUTES.COMPARISON_OPERATOR_CODE, STG_CG1_QP_PRICING_ATTRIBUTES.CONTEXT, STG_CG1_QP_PRICING_ATTRIBUTES.ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CG1_QP_PRICING_ATTRIBUTES.ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CG1_QP_PRICING_ATTRIBUTES.ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CG1_QP_PRICING_ATTRIBUTES.ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CG1_QP_PRICING_ATTRIBUTES.ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CG1_QP_PRICING_ATTRIBUTES.ATTRIBUTE6, STG_CG1_QP_PRICING_ATTRIBUTES.ATTRIBUTE7, STG_CG1_QP_PRICING_ATTRIBUTES.ATTRIBUTE8, STG_CG1_QP_PRICING_ATTRIBUTES.ATTRIBUTE9, STG_CG1_QP_PRICING_ATTRIBUTES.ATTRIBUTE10, STG_CG1_QP_PRICING_ATTRIBUTES.ATTRIBUTE11, STG_CG1_QP_PRICING_ATTRIBUTES.ATTRIBUTE12, STG_CG1_QP_PRICING_ATTRIBUTES.ATTRIBUTE13, STG_CG1_QP_PRICING_ATTRIBUTES.ATTRIBUTE14, STG_CG1_QP_PRICING_ATTRIBUTES.ATTRIBUTE15, STG_CG1_QP_PRICING_ATTRIBUTES.LIST_HEADER_ID, STG_CG1_QP_PRICING_ATTRIBUTES.PRICING_PHASE_ID, STG_CG1_QP_PRICING_ATTRIBUTES.QUALIFICATION_IND, STG_CG1_QP_PRICING_ATTRIBUTES.PRICING_ATTR_VALUE_FROM_NUMBER, STG_CG1_QP_PRICING_ATTRIBUTES.PRICING_ATTR_VALUE_TO_NUMBER, STG_CG1_QP_PRICING_ATTRIBUTES.DISTINCT_ROW_COUNT, STG_CG1_QP_PRICING_ATTRIBUTES.SEARCH_IND, STG_CG1_QP_PRICING_ATTRIBUTES.PATTERN_VALUE_FROM_POSITIVE, STG_CG1_QP_PRICING_ATTRIBUTES.PATTERN_VALUE_TO_POSITIVE, STG_CG1_QP_PRICING_ATTRIBUTES.PATTERN_VALUE_FROM_NEGATIVE, STG_CG1_QP_PRICING_ATTRIBUTES.PATTERN_VALUE_TO_NEGATIVE, STG_CG1_QP_PRICING_ATTRIBUTES.PRODUCT_SEGMENT_ID, STG_CG1_QP_PRICING_ATTRIBUTES.PRICING_SEGMENT_ID, STG_CG1_QP_PRICING_ATTRIBUTES.ORIG_SYS_LINE_REF, STG_CG1_QP_PRICING_ATTRIBUTES.ORIG_SYS_PRICING_ATTR_REF, STG_CG1_QP_PRICING_ATTRIBUTES.ORIG_SYS_HEADER_REF, STG_CG1_QP_PRICING_ATTRIBUTES.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_QP_PRICING_ATTRIBUTES.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_QP_PRICING_ATTRIBUTES.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_QP_PRICING_ATTRIBUTES.REFRESH_DATETIME, STG_CG1_QP_PRICING_ATTRIBUTES.PROCESSED_FLAG 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_QP_PRICING_ATTRIBUTES STG_CG1_QP_PRICING_ATTRIBUTES,
 (
 select PRICING_ATTRIBUTE_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_QP_PRICING_ATTRIBUTES
 minus
 select PRICING_ATTRIBUTE_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_QP_PRICING_ATTRIBUTES
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.PRICING_ATTRIBUTE_ID = STG_CG1_QP_PRICING_ATTRIBUTES.PRICING_ATTRIBUTE_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_QP_PRICING_ATTRIBUTES.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_QP_PRICING_ATTRIBUTES)
